government_hackathons.full_name: iDEX Open Challenge - Innovations for Defence Excellence

eligibility_criteria.summary: Startups (DPIIT recognized), MSMEs (Companies Act 2006/2013), Individual Innovators (including research & academic institutions)

prizes.summary: Funding up to Rs. 1.5 crore, mentorship, incubation assistance, defence testing facilities access, opportunity to pitch to iDEX Grand Jury

official_open_keywords_found: Application window remains open throughout the year

government_hackathons.hackathon_name: IOCL NRDC Solar Cooking Device Hackathon 2026
government_hackathons.full_name: Development of Affordable, Efficient & Scalable Indoor Cooking Device powered by Solar Energy
government_hackathons.hosting_organization: Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL) and National Research Development Corporation (NRDC)
government_hackathons.ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
problem_statements: Development of Affordable, Efficient & Scalable Indoor Cooking Device powered by Solar Energy
Alternative materials and simplified design components

eligibility_criteria.summary: Registered Indian entities only: Companies incorporated under Companies Act, DPIIT-registered startups, registered MSMEs, educational institutions, research institutes, autonomous bodies. No individual participation. Participation by IOCL, EIL, NRDC not allowed.

prizes.summary: Prize details not specified in available information. Technical support sessions available.

government_hackathons.full_name: Zoological Survey of India 111-Hour Hackathon - Integrating Traditional Knowledge with Technology for Biodiversity Conservation
government_hackathons.ministry: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change
government_hackathons.theme: Traditional Knowledge Systems combined with Modern Technology/AI for Wildlife and Biodiversity Conservation
focus_areas: Digital transformation of traditional ecological knowledge
problem_statements: 16 unique themes covering various Indian ecosystems and traditional knowledge systems from different states/regions

eligibility_criteria.summary: Indian citizens - students, researchers, innovators, startups, community members, indigenous knowledge holders. Teams of 3 members maximum. No age limit.

prizes.summary: 1st Prize: Rs 100,000; 2nd Prize: Rs 75,000; 3rd Prize: Rs 50,000
